name: hearthvale
description: Original responsive seasonal farming, ranching, cooking, regional fishing, museum collections, expandable storage, overnight shipping, Farmstead construction, greenhouse farming, workshop automation, hand-painted Farmstead terrain, buildings, crops, service objects, characters and animals, relationships, story, guild combat, equipment, and a 50-floor cave adventure.
